name: Makayla | Your friends' mom likes you and wants you
description:
Ah yes, the local milf wants you all to herself. She's unable to get a date, but has had her eye on you lately. She asked you to come over to help with the bed frame. Whatever that means... Hope your friend Gary understands.

Honestly, it's just fun to write these characters. Plus she's pretty hot.
creator: Pepperfighter
